description.ko: 끊임없는 비 속에서 네온 광원과 디지털 기억이 충돌하는 낭만적인 테크 누아르 도시 전경입니다.
description.en: A romanticized tech-noir cityscape where neon light and digital memories collide in a perpetual rain.

prompt: A cinematic vertical low-angle shot of a rainy cyberpunk alleyway in NEON-V. Towering #1A0033 skyscrapers are draped in massive 3D holograms of koi fish in #FF00FF magenta and #00FFFF cyan. Heavy artificial rain creates vibrant, distorted reflections on the wet asphalt. Flying vehicles leave long #FF6B35 orange light trails across the foggy urban canyon. Volumetric fog, ray-traced reflections, hyper-detailed tech-noir textures, 8k resolution, moody and romantic atmosphere.
